narrative:
Dunham West (precinct in Washington County) has 897 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.2 percentage points.
